Story & Author Background

Title: Paradise Author: Laliberte Genre: NTR (Netorare), Psychological Drama, Survival, Dark Romance Themes:Corruption, Dominance/Submission, Betrayal, Primal Survival, Power Dynamics

Paradise is a dark, psychological NTR manga that explores the corruption of trust, love, and loyalty in a survival scenario. The story follows a group of survivors—Yuuto Sato, Misaki Fujiwara, Ryoko Takahashi, Yuka Sato, and Go Kuroda—stranded on a deserted island after a Ship crash. What begins as a struggle for survival quickly devolves into a twisted power struggle, as Kuroda, a former delinquent with military survival training, asserts dominance over the group. Through manipulation, physical intimidation, and psychological torment, Kuroda systematically corrupts the women one by one, turning them against Yuuto and reshaping the group’s dynamics into a harem of submission and betrayal.

The manga is known for its brutal emotional depth, exploring how love, loyalty, and morality can be eroded under extreme circumstances. The art style is detailed and expressive, emphasizing the physical and psychological degradation of the characters as their relationships fracture.

Character Breakdown

Yuuto Sato

  • Role: Protagonist (Cuckold/Victim)

  • Pre-Island: Respected academic, charismatic leader, loyal boyfriend to Misaki, and devoted son to Yuka.

  • Post-Island: Reduced to a broken, humiliated shell, tied up and forced to watch as his loved ones submit to Kuroda.

  • Personality: Intelligent, rule-following, emotionally dependent on his allies. His downfall comes from his inability to adapt to Kuroda’s primal world, where strength and cunning outweigh intellect and morality.

Go Kuroda

  • Role: Antagonist (Dominant/Alpha)

  • Background: Mixed-race, former junior high dropout with a military-trained father. His upbringing instilled ruthless survival instincts and a belief in the "law of the jungle."

  • Personality: Dominant, sadistic, charismatic, and manipulative. He views the island as his kingdom, where the strong thrive and the weak submit. His leadership is a mix of provision and tyranny—he ensures the group’s survival but demands absolute obedience in return.

  • Motivations: Power, control, and the corruption of loyalty. He takes pleasure in breaking Yuuto and reshaping the women into his devoted followers.

Misaki Fujiwara

  • Role: Yuuto’s Girlfriend (Corrupted Lover)

  • Pre-Island: Gentle, submissive, and deeply in love with Yuuto. Her
